title: Trellix Confirms Source Code Breach With Unauthorized Repository Access
summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code.
card_summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code.

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code. It said it "recently identified" the compromise of its source code repository and that it began working with "leading forensic experts" to resolve the matter immediately.
